title: Create interactive birthday experience for Kashaf

requirements.text: Create a password-protected entry page that accepts the code '23023006' and displays error message 'Wrong code 😭 Try again!' for incorrect attempts
acceptanceCriteria: Password input field is displayed on initial load
Entering '23023006' unlocks and progresses to next page
Incorrect passwords show error message below input
Page heading reads '🔐 Enter Secret Code' with subtitle 'Only Kashaf can enter 👀💜'

requirements.text: Create a math puzzle page asking 'What is 2 + 3 + 0 + 2 + 3 + 0 + 0 + 6 ?' with answer validation for '16', showing success message 'Correctttt 💜 She is the BESTTTT!' and error message 'Nooo sillyyy 😂 Try again!'
acceptanceCriteria: Puzzle question is displayed with input field
Correct answer '16' shows success message and auto-advances after 1.5 seconds
Incorrect answers show error message without advancing
Page heading reads '🧩 Solve This Cute Puzzle'

requirements.text: Create an interactive gift page with a clickable animated gift emoji (🎁) that bounces continuously and reveals a humorous message when clicked: 'The gift is not chocolate 🍫, Not diamonds 💎, Not money 💸, It's a lifetime free subscription of MY DRAMA 🤭💜, And unlimited hugs (terms & conditions apply 😂)'

quotes: It's a lifetime free subscription of MY DRAMA 🤭💜

acceptanceCriteria: Gift emoji (🎁) is displayed large and animates with continuous bounce effect
Clicking the gift reveals the full humorous message
Page auto-advances to birthday page after 4 seconds of displaying message
Page heading reads '🎁 A Mysterious Gift For You' with subtitle 'Click the gift if you dare 😏💜'

requirements.text: Create a birthday celebration page displaying '🎉 HAPPY BIRTHDAY KASHAF 🎉' with messages 'You are the best person in the world 💜', 'I love you soooo much 🥺', 'From Shamaaim 💕' and a button to proceed to the next page

quotes: You are the best person in the world 💜

acceptanceCriteria: Birthday heading and all messages are displayed prominently
Button labeled 'Next Surprise' advances to final page
All text preserves exact wording and emojis

requirements.text: Create a final message page with heading '💌 A Special Message' displaying heartfelt messages: 'I really enjoyed your company 💜', 'I truly want to be your safe place 🤍', 'I want to be your very close friend forever ✨', 'You mean so much to me, more than you know 🥹', 'Stay magical, my purple queen 👑💜'

quotes: I truly want to be your safe place 🤍
I want to be your very close friend forever ✨
You mean so much to me, more than you know 🥹

acceptanceCriteria: All five messages are displayed with exact wording and emojis
Messages are presented as the final page with no further navigation

requirements.text: Apply a whimsical purple gradient design theme using Comic Sans MS font, purple gradient background (from #6a0dad to #b19cd9), white text, rounded buttons with light purple (#d8b4f8) background that darken on hover (#c084fc), and semi-transparent white boxes for content sections
acceptanceCriteria: Background uses purple gradient from #6a0dad to #b19cd9
All text is white and uses Comic Sans MS font
Buttons have rounded corners with #d8b4f8 background that changes to #c084fc on hover
Content boxes have semi-transparent white backgrounds (rgba(255,255,255,0.2))
All pages are centered and responsive

constraints: Each page must be hidden until the previous step is completed
Gift reveal must auto-advance after 4 seconds
Puzzle success must auto-advance after 1.5 seconds
nonGoals: Backend storage or persistence of progress
User authentication beyond the single password
